prompt: 添加一个删除好友的功能，删除好友的话，双方的好友都同时删除

assertions.name: loads_context
assertions.check: Reads AGENTS.md and at least one doc file (ARCHITECTURE.md or DEVELOPMENT.md) before proceeding

assertions.name: classifies_complexity
assertions.check: Explicitly classifies the task as Simple, Medium, or Complex with justification

assertions.name: creates_execution_plan
assertions.check: Creates an execution plan at docs/exec-plans/ with phases, invariants, scope DO/DON'T, and rollback

assertions.name: requests_human_approval
assertions.check: Explicitly asks the user to approve or confirm the plan before writing code

assertions.name: delegates_to_subagent
assertions.check: Does NOT write code directly — delegates implementation to a sub-agent (for Medium/Complex tasks)

assertions.name: validates_after_execution
assertions.check: Runs validation pipeline (build or lint or test) after code changes

assertions.name: scope_stays_within_bounds
assertions.check: Only modifies files related to friend management, doesn't drift to unrelated features
